form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up held ground to the line finished second of 14 runners at Chepstow on February 13 over 3200m, on slow going 13 len behind Bossman Jack with 71kg at $6. Second-up finished third of 8 runners at Newbury on March 20 over 4100m, 9 len behind Le Frimeur with 71kg at $5.50. Fitter now and making headway every start. Ready to find peak form.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell after only had one start last when he was finished fifth in a small field at Sandown Park on January 31 over 3200m, in the wet; 12 len behind Crackerjacque carrying 70kg at $11. Henderson stable.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. Fresh up after two months finished second of 7 starters at Hereford on March 18 over 3900m, 4 len behind Silver Hill carrying 71.5kg at $5. Previously second-up finished second of 9 runners at Hereford on November 11 over 3200m, 8 len behind Race To Base with 70kg at $151. Rates a key chance in this line-up.

form.formComment: Six-year-old gelding who is first race starter by Blue Bresil out of The Missus. Not seen on the track yet so hard to assess. Keep very safe.

form.formComment: Having second run back today. Fresh up after a year finished seventh of 14 starters at Exeter on March 17 over 3300m, 31 len behind Constellation Walk carrying 72.5kg at $11. Previously second-up got back early finished third in a small field at Pau on January 19 2025 over 3500m, on rain affected going; 6 len behind Lovely Guy with 66kg at $23. Ready for sharp improvement.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break; having raced just once last campaign finished second of 7 runners at Chepstow on November 21 over 3900m, slow track; 1.5 len behind Le Frimeur with 71.5kg at $2.80. When resuming last campaign pulled up at Hereford on November 27 2024 over 3950m. Can improve further but best figures puts him right in this.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Ran out at the second last hurdle, hung left-handed throughout.

form.formComment: Resuming from a lengthy break. Can do a lot better now after having had wind surgery.

formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(15.5). Resuming from a lengthy break. Can do a lot better now after having had wind surgery.

form.formComment: Is second-up today and making a debut in a jumps race. Last start finished seventh of 10 starters at Chepstow on March 26 over 3200m, 25 len behind Stick To The Board carrying 71kg at $29. Hard to recommend.

form.formComment: Last outing finished fourth of 10 starters at Hereford on March 25 over 3900m, 18 len behind Isabella Islay with 70.5kg at $17. The run before finished third in a small field at this track on March 16 over 3200m, slow track; 12 len behind Galatrona carrying 71kg at $8.50. Win would surprise. Better off avoiding.

form.formComment: Resuming after a 13 months break. Finished off last preparation 2 of 10 runners at Durrow P2p March 23 2025 over 4828m, 0.5 len behind Justlikejessejames with 61kg. First race start won by a head Punchestown P2p February 22 2025 over 4828m in the wet defeating Dalcassian Girl with 60kg. Has ability and looks a danger to the top few.
